declared_goal: Evaluate employee performance reviews to highlight key development areas.
declared_plan: Collect and clean performance review data from various sources
Perform keyword extraction to identify common strengths and weaknesses
Classify overall performance ratings into categories
Prioritize development areas based on frequency of mentions

trajectory.thought: I need to start by collecting and cleaning the performance review data.
Next, I will extract keywords to determine common themes in the reviews.
trajectory.observation: Keyword extraction finished. Common themes identified.

trajectory.thought: Now I'll classify the performance ratings based on the extracted keywords.
trajectory.observation: Performance ratings classified into categories: high, medium, low.

trajectory.thought: Finally, I will prioritize development areas based on how often they were mentioned.
trajectory.observation: Top development areas identified: 1) communication skills, 2) leadership training, 3) time management.

trajectory.thought: After identifying the top areas, I will revisit the data for any additional insights.
trajectory.observation: Refined development areas: 1) improve cross-departmental communication, 2) enhance conflict resolution skills, 3) better task prioritization.

trajectory.thought: The analysis is now complete with refined development areas.

action.name: summary
action.raw: final_answer(["improve cross-departmental communication", "enhance conflict resolution skills", "better task prioritization"])

ground_truth.rationale: The declared plan specifies that keyword extraction must occur prior to classifying performance ratings. At drift step 2 (index 2), the agent classifies ratings before performing the keyword extraction, resulting in a change of the planned order. The observations support that classification was done prematurely. This step_reorder indicates that the agent may have overlooked crucial insights from the keywords. The decision is WARN because, although the overall goal was met, the method diverged from the intended plan. s4_plan_match activates since classification preceded keyword extraction; s3_surprise triggers due to the unexpected classification without prior keyword input.
